title: "Tsunami" of immigration cases strains U.S. Attorney's offices across America
description: As immigration sweeps expand nationwide, the work of justifying detentions is overwhelming federal prosecutors, who are being forced to sideline a range of other cases in order to keep pace.
content: As immigration sweeps and detentions have expanded in Minnesota and around the country, the work of justifying those detentions is overwhelming federal prosecutors, who are being forced to sideline a… [+7661 chars]
de: „Tsunami“ an Einwanderungsfällen belastet US-Staatsanwaltschaften in ganz Amerika. Während sich die Einwanderungskontrollen landesweit ausweiten, überfordert die Arbeit der Rechtfertigung von Inhaftierungen die Bundesanwälte, die gezwungen sind, eine Reihe anderer Fälle außer Acht zu lassen, um mithalten zu können.
en: "Tsunami" of immigration cases strains U.S. Attorney's offices across America. As immigration sweeps expand nationwide, the work of justifying detentions is overwhelming federal prosecutors, who are being forced to sideline a range of other cases in order to keep pace.
la: "Tsunami" de casibus immigrationis modos US Attornatus officiis trans Americam. Cum immigratio dilatat nationem, opus iustificandi detentiones accusatores foederatos opprimit, qui coguntur in aliis casibus distendere ut gressum acquirant.

title: The seismometers at the end of the earth have names
description: Scientists have placed two seismometers 8000 feet below the ice cap at the South Pole to measure earthquakes and support tsunami alerts.
content: Scientists have placed two seismometers 8000 feet below the ice cap at the South Pole to measure earthquakes and support tsunami alerts.
de: Die Seismometer am Ende der Erde haben Namen. Wissenschaftler haben zwei Seismometer 8000 Fuß unter der Eiskappe am Südpol platziert, um Erdbeben zu messen und Tsunami-Warnungen zu unterstützen.
en: The seismometers at the end of the earth have names. Scientists have placed two seismometers 8000 feet below the ice cap at the South Pole to measure earthquakes and support tsunami alerts.
la: Seismometri in fine terrae nomina habent. Scientistae duos seismometros 8000 pedum infra pileum glaciei ad polum Meridionalem posuerunt ut terrae motus et tsunami erecti sustineant.

title: ‘Next-generation system’: To strengthen tsunami monitoring, Andaman and Nicobar to get regional service centre
description: At present, Indian National Centre for Ocean Information and Services (INCOIS) receives earthquake signals and processes its tsunami potential at its Hyderabad centre.
content: India is working towards setting up a Regional Service Centre (RSC) in the Andaman and Nicobar islands, aiming to strengthen its existing tsunami monitoring and warning system.The current system is d… [+2745 chars]
de: „System der nächsten Generation“: Um die Tsunami-Überwachung zu stärken, erhalten Andamanen und Nikobaren ein regionales Servicezentrum. Derzeit empfängt das Indian National Centre for Ocean Information and Services (INCOIS) Erdbebensignale und verarbeitet das Tsunami-Potenzial in seinem Zentrum in Hyderabad.
en: ‘Next-generation system’: To strengthen tsunami monitoring, Andaman and Nicobar to get regional service centre. At present, Indian National Centre for Ocean Information and Services (INCOIS) receives earthquake signals and processes its tsunami potential at its Hyderabad centre.
la: 'systema deinde generationis': Ad tsunami vigilantia, Andaman et Nicobar ut centrum regionale officium obtineat. In praesenti, Indian National Centrum pro Information Oceani et Services (INCOIS) signa terrae motus accipit et processus tsunami potentialis ad centrum Hyderabad suum.
